answer.text: The path-discovery case finds every simple route from Ostend-Bruges International Airport to Václav Havel Airport Prague with at most two stopovers.

reason_why.text: The airport graph is built from the full source dataset, then a depth-limited DFS enumerates simple paths that respect the stopover limit.

reason_why.label: Airports
reason_why.value: Ostend-Bruges International Airport -> Liège Airport -> Heraklion International Nikos Kazantzakis Airport -> Václav Havel Airport Prague
